testcase.name: parseServiceIdentifier > string format > parses "api/gateway" into the correct ServiceIdentifier
parseServiceIdentifier > string format > parses "data/my-database" into the correct ServiceIdentifier
parseServiceIdentifier > string format > parses "frontend/site" into the correct ServiceIdentifier
parseServiceIdentifier > string format > throws for invalid string "gateway{api}": conn 0
parseServiceIdentifier > string format > throws for invalid string "just-a-name": conn 1
parseServiceIdentifier > string format > throws for invalid string "/service": conn 2
parseServiceIdentifier > string format > throws for invalid string "group/": conn 3
parseServiceIdentifier > object format > accepts a valid { groupId, serviceId } object
parseServiceIdentifier > object format > throws for invalid object ({ serviceId: 'gateway' })
parseServiceIdentifier > object format > throws for invalid object ({ groupId: 'api' })
parseServiceIdentifier > object format > throws for invalid object ({ groupId: '', serviceId: 'gateway' })
parseServiceIdentifier > invalid types > throws for null
parseServiceIdentifier > invalid types > throws for 42
parseServiceIdentifier > invalid types > throws for undefined
parseServiceIdentifier > invalid types > throws for true
parseServiceIdentifier > invalid types > throws for
validateServiceDefinition > returns a correct ServiceDefinition for valid minimal input
validateServiceDefinition > description is undefined when not provided
validateServiceDefinition > throws for invalid root input null
validateServiceDefinition > throws for invalid root input bad
validateServiceDefinition > throws for invalid root input 42
validateServiceDefinition > throws for invalid field in { serviceType: 'S3' }
validateServiceDefinition > throws for invalid field in { friendlyName: '', serviceType: 'S3' }
validateServiceDefinition > throws for invalid field in { friendlyName: 42, serviceType: 'S3' }
validateServiceDefinition > throws for invalid field in { friendlyName: 'X' }
validateServiceDefinition > throws for invalid field in { friendlyName: 'X', serviceType: 'UNKNOWN' }
validateServiceDefinition > outgoingConnections > parses valid outgoing connections
validateServiceDefinition > outgoingConnections > throws for invalid connection in { friendlyName: 'API Gateway', serviceType: 'LAMBDA', description: 'Handles routing', outgoingConnections: 'bad' }

validateServiceDefinition > outgoingConnections > throws for invalid connection in { friendlyName: 'API Gateway', serviceType: 'LAMBDA', description: 'Handles routing', outgoingConnections: [ { connectionType: 'UNKNOWN', targetIdentifier: 'data/x', description: 'x' } ] }

validateServiceDefinition > outgoingConnections > throws for invalid connection in { friendlyName: 'API Gateway', serviceType: 'LAMBDA', description: 'Handles routing', outgoingConnections: [ { connectionType: 'CALLS', targetIdentifier: 'no-slash', description: 'x' } ] }

validateServiceDefinition > outgoingConnections > throws for invalid connection in { friendlyName: 'API Gateway', serviceType: 'LAMBDA', description: 'Handles routing', outgoingConnections: [ { connectionType: 'CALLS', targetIdentifier: 'data/x' } ] }
validateGroupInfo > returns a correct GroupInfo for valid input
validateGroupInfo > includes optional description and teamId when provided
validateGroupInfo > sets both id and groupName to the groupId argument
validateGroupInfo > throws for invalid root input null
validateGroupInfo > throws for invalid root input 42
validateGroupInfo > throws for invalid name in {}
validateGroupInfo > throws for invalid name in { name: '' }
validateGroupInfo > throws for invalid name in { name: 42 }
validateTeam > returns a correct Team for valid minimal input
validateTeam > includes optional description and teamLead when provided
validateTeam > sets teamId to the teamId argument
validateTeam > throws for invalid root input null
validateTeam > throws for invalid root input bad
validateTeam > throws for invalid name in {}
validateTeam > throws for invalid name in { name: '' }
validateTeam > reachability > parses reachability entries [ { channel: 'slack', detail: '#cloud-shepherds' } ] correctly
validateTeam > reachability > parses reachability entries [ { channel: 'slack', detail: '#team' }, { channel: 'email', detail: 'team@co.com' } ] correctly
validateTeam > reachability > returns empty reachability when the field is absent
validateTeam > reachability > throws for invalid reachability [ 'bad' ]
validateTeam > reachability > throws for invalid reachability [ { detail: '#x' } ]
validateTeam > reachability > throws for invalid reachability [ { channel: 'carrier-pigeon', detail: 'x' } ]
validateTeam > reachability > throws for invalid reachability [ { channel: 'slack' } ]
validateTeam > reachability > throws for invalid reachability [ { channel: 'slack', detail: '' } ]
validateTeam > reachability > includes the list of allowed channels in the error for an unknown channel
